description: A control room dispatcher finishing their shift must provide a complete and accurate handover to the incoming dispatcher.

nodes.task_description: Review the events of the last shift, including any production issues, safety incidents, or equipment status changes.

expected_outcome.value: The outgoing dispatcher has a full summary of the shift's events.

nodes.task_description: Fill out the digital shift handover form, documenting the current status of the mine and any ongoing issues.

expected_outcome.value: The handover form is completed accurately.

nodes.task_description: Conduct a verbal handover with the incoming dispatcher, walking them through the report to ensure a full understanding.

expected_outcome.value: A successful handover is completed, ensuring continuity of operations.
